title: Mentor Guide — Day 10 — Pitch · Empathy · Advise
coachingObjective: Coach squads through evidence-based pitch delivery, empathy practice with Miguel, and Stage Gate II readiness.

timing.preSession: Review pitch readiness cards: FEC lab, portfolio, professional readiness
timing.duringSession: Support pitch delivery; observe empathy lab discussion; capture weekly squad review
timing.postSession: Submit stage gate decision and up to 3 commendations

discussionQuestions: Did the pitch reflect what the market taught the squad?
Which customer quotes landed strongest with the audience?
What did squads learn about Miguel that changes how they would advise?
Is the squad ready for Week 3 ADVISE?
observationAreas: Empathy map depth — genuine perspective-taking vs surface answers
Squad collaboration during pitch and empathy discussion
coachingTips: Rate four dimensions only — no individual rubrics
Use Squad XP dashboard for automatic activity credit
Commendations max 3 per squad (Leadership, Best Interview, Empathy Insight, etc.)
Encourage squads to connect empathy lab insights to their validated FEC
warningSigns: Pitch slides manually rewritten outside SPIKE (duplicate encoding)
Empathy worksheet completed individually without squad discussion
reflectionPrompts: What is the one insight every advisor should know from your squad's research?
How does understanding Miguel help your squad advise with empathy?

activityCoachingNotes.notes: SPIKE Studio presentation mode — large cards, evidence-first delivery.
Facilitate squad discussion after individual empathy maps. Push for specifics about Miguel.
Stage Gate: Not Ready / Almost Ready / Ready For Build. Week 3 unlocks ADVISE.

debriefWithFaculty: Empathy lab highlights to carry into Week 3
